column3: Galangal Extract refers to a concentrated form of the root of the galangal plant, which has been carefully processed and extracted to retain its aromatic properties and health benefits.

Galangal Powder is a flavoring agent, typically made from the dried rhizome of the galangal plant, which belongs to the ginger family and has been commonly used in Asian cuisines for its distinct aromatic properties that give dishes an earthy, slightly spicy taste.

Galangal Paste is a spice blend or condiment typically used as seasoning in Southeast Asian cuisine, primarily composed of fresh galangal root combined with other aromatic ingredients such as garlic, ginger and shrimp paste.

Galangal Tincture is a potent herbal concoction derived from the rhizome of the galangal plant, which is infused into alcohol to create a highly concentrated extract that can be used for medicinal purposes.

Galangal Decoction is a traditional medicinal beverage prepared by boiling and steeping galangal root, an aromatic plant commonly found in South and Southeast Asian cuisine, to create a concentrated infusion that is believed to have numerous health benefits and promote well-being.
Galangal Tea is a unique beverage, typically made from the rhizome of galangal plant which possesses a distinct spicy and earthy aromatic taste.
Galangal Capsule is a food item derived from the rhizome of a tropical plant, which comes enclosed in a capsule-like form for convenient use and consumption.

Galangal Essential Oil is a natural, concentrated plant-derived extract obtained through careful extraction methods from the rhizomes or rootstocks of various galangal species, primarily known for its unique aroma and medicinal properties.

Galangal Fresh Roots is a type of rhizomatous plant from Southeast Asia that, when picked young and fresh, possesses a unique aromatic flavor which is utilized extensively in various cuisines for its distinct taste profile.

Galangal Dried Roots is a spice derived from the rhizome of a particular species of ginger, which is characterized by its unique flavour and aroma when dried and used as a culinary ingredient in various cuisines.
